name: Global Water Resources, Inc.
summary: Global Water Resources, Inc. (GWRS) is a water resource management company operating regulated water, wastewater, and recycled water utilities exclusively in Arizona. The company owns and operates multiple utility subsidiaries including GW-Santa Cruz, GW-Palo Verde, GW-Farmers, GW-Hassayampa, GW-Belmont, GW-Turner, GW-Saguaro, and GW-Ocotillo, providing water and wastewater services primarily concentrated within a single municipality in Arizona, with operations subject to regulation by the Arizona Corporation Commission (ACC).
